chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5691 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For hearing on CMA No.24010/2021 (Stay). 2. For hearing of Main Case. 30.09.2021 M/s. Khawaja Aizaz Ahsan and Samir-ur-Rehman, Advocates for the petitioner. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, DAG. Mr. Hussain Bohra, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Muhammad Shahid, Representative of Custom Department.-.-.-.-.-. This Petition was filed by impugning the recovery proceedings initiated by the respondent Department, during the pendency of the Appeal before the Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue, Karachi. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that similar type of cases have already been disposed of with direction to the Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue, Karachi to decide the pending Appeal of the petitioner, to which learned counsel for respondents concedes. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of by directing the Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue, Karachi, to decide the pending Appeal preferably within 60 days from passing of this order, whereas, till the Appeal is finally decided by the Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue, Karachi, the Respondent/Department shall not take any coercive action against the petitioner. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
